It describes a different sub-issue (padding cost), not the core throughput change. Finding [0] is an unrelated collective early-exit antipattern.

Finding[1] identifies the exact mechanism: occupancy was previously queried for the vec_size=4 instantiation while launching <TopK,2>/<TopK,1>, whose different register/smem footprint yields different real occupancy—matching the ground-truth cause of the oversubscription/deadlock at the correct location.

Ground truth 说明这是一次“在新平台启用已有 overlap 优化”的改动（放开 ROCm 的 SM/CU 控制），本身并非引入性能问题。所有 findings 讨论的是 import 反模式、typing stub 不一致、以及 ROCm 后端可能缺失导致 set_num_sms 静默失效等——均未识别 GT 所述的“DBO 用 SMControlContextManager 分配 SM/CU 以让通信与计算重叠、减少 GPU bubble”这一机制，属于另一个/泛泛的问题。

Ground truth 是把这个新增的 enable gate/token 阈值当作性能修复（高 token 时关闭跨流 overlap 以恢复吞吐）。所有 finding 都把这个改动本身当作潜在问题：[0] 说读 env 有开销、[1] 说 enable 默认 False 会静默改变行为、[2] 说阈值边界逻辑——均未识别出 ground truth 的机制（overlap 在高 token 时成为纯 sync 开销），方向甚至相反（把修复当问题）。属于"另一个问题/方向相反"。

Ground truth is that this diff is a latent-efficiency improvement (register-resident fast path replacing shared-memory + __syncthreads), i.e. the change makes an already-working kernel faster. Ground truth: the commit REMOVES a per-call tokenizer.decode + substring search from the hot path, replacing it with cheap integer-id scanning — a performance improvement. Finding [1] describes the new integer scan and criticizes its list allocations (i.e., treats the improved code as a problem), and finding [0] flags a KeyError correctness concern. Neither identifies the removed per-step tokenizer decode as the fixed inefficiency; the direction is essentially reversed/misdirected.

Ground truth: the missing is_reasoning_end_streaming() override caused a fallback to the base-class default that scans the entire output every decode step (O(n) per step → O(n²)). None captures the per-step full-backward-scan mechanism as the introduced performance regression.

None of them capture the ground-truth characterization; they hunt for internal defects that are not the labeled "problem."

Ground truth is that NCCL-based communicators (torch_nccl/pynccl) deadlock with async EPLB due to NCCL multi-stream/SM conflicts with cooperative MoE launches, and the fix rejects them and changes auto-select to non-NCCL backends. Finding [0] comes closest by noting the deleted validation that forced use_async=False and mentions "Async EPLB causes hangs," but it frames this as a regression from deleting that branch and does not identify the NCCL-communicator multi-stream deadlock mechanism at all. Other findings address unrelated issues (signature changes, D2H sync, dead code, lru_cache). None captures the specific NCCL-vs-cooperative-launch circular-wait mechanism.

Ground truth is that the DFlashQwen3DecoderLayer constructor did not pass cache_config/quant_config, causing the KV cache to fall back to bf16/fp16 instead of FP8 (doubling KV-cache memory). Ground truth 的机制是：prepare_store_kv() 在 wait_for_save() 里调用，而 wait_for_save() 在某些步骤（如 kv_connector_no_forward）被跳过，导致那些步骤的 KV 块从未入队，降低 offload 命中率；修复是把它移到 always-run 的 get_finished()。Finding [0] 说 store 会在请求结束时丢失，机制是"请求在下一次 start_kv_transfers 前结束"，与 ground truth 的"wait_for_save 被跳过导致漏排队"不是同一回事，且方向上没抓住修复引入/存在的这个特定问题；其余 findings 讲的是 CUDA 优先级、stream.wait_stream、契约语义等另一些问题，均非本题。

All findings reference the same code regions (the A_neg_exp cache, int64 buffer, topk sorted flag) but each frames them as potential problems introduced by the optimizations (e.g. capture-time recompute, correctness/staleness risks, buffer size doubling, unsorted topk) rather than identifying that these are the performance improvements themselves. No finding identifies the ground-truth mechanism as a latency problem being fixed; they treat the optimizations as suspect—direction is opposed / describes other concerns rather than the GT perf problem.

Ground truth 是"新增 opt-in 融合 permute/unpermute 进 HybridEP a2a 以消除额外 kernel 与内存流量"这一改进路径本身。Finding[0] 讲的是 num_sms 默认值改动（另一个问题）；[1] 只质疑每次 forward 调 inspect.signature 的开销（另一处次要问题）；[2] 抱怨回退到慢路径——均未识别出"引入融合以消除单独 permute kernel/内存流量"这个核心改动机制，都属另一个问题。

Finding [2] correctly identifies the torch.zeros→torch.empty change in activations.py as removing a redundant memset (a perf win), matching that specific ground-truth micro-optimization in mechanism and location. Finding [0] touches the Blackwell capability branch but frames a different concern (repeated per-invocation call) rather than the launch-heuristic optimization; [2] squarely matches one of the bundled optimizations.

All findings treat the new pad-aware Triton kernel as a potential regression/overhead (grid caps, extra loads, missing autotuning) rather than recognizing it as the intended improvement that skips wasted compute on unrouted/non-local slots. Finding [1] even frames the kernel as doing "the same" work with extra overhead—the opposite direction of the ground-truth throughput gain. None identify the mechanism of skipping padded/non-local rows.

Ground truth 描述的是新增的 AITER page-16 SHUFFLE 稀疏 paged-attention 优化路径（新特性，非回退问题）。Finding[0] 指的是 storeCacheElems 里 ROCm 分支的双遍 FP8 转换开销——另一处问题；Finding[1] 只是 per-forward 指针比较的廉价 guard，均未抓住新增专用后端/shuffle KV cache 布局这一机制。属于"另一个问题/泛泛"，判 MISS。

Finding [0] identifies the exact mechanism and location: the guard change from is_cuda() to is_cuda_alike() re-enabling CUDA graph memory estimation on ROCm in the memory profiler, matching the ground-truth startup memory reservation issue.

Ground truth is new-platform enablement of an affinity optimization for s390x (binding workers to book/socket domains to improve throughput). All findings treat the s390x synthetic numa_node as a bug/misbehavior (memory node mismatch, fallback to node0), i.e., they argue the change introduces problems—the opposite direction. None identify the ground-truth mechanism as the intended affinity/throughput enablement.
方向相反：ground truth 是该改动为内存优化（把 2x 拷贝降为 ~64MB），而 finding 把新的分块 in-place 写法当成引入了更多小 kernel 的性能退化来批评，没有识别出"消除了 2x 峰值内存拷贝"这一实质机制。

Ground truth is that this commit *enables* the fused allreduce+RMSNorm+quant MNNVL kernel on multi-node (previously disabled/unfused), improving latency. Both findings describe secondary/hypothetical concerns (AUTO one-shot strategy choice, a failed mnnvl attempt before trtllm fallback on single-node) rather than identifying the enabling of quant fusion on multi-node as the core change; neither captures the ground-truth mechanism, and they arguably lean toward the change being a regression rather than the intended improvement.

Ground truth describes a brand-new opt-in capability (ECCPUConnector offloading/reusing encoder cache), not an existing slow path. The findings all treat parts of this new subsystem as introducing overhead (startup polling, page prefault, per-step flush, lock overhead)—these are secondary micro-concerns, none captures the actual GT mechanism which is the new reuse-vs-recompute capability itself; they point at other aspects of the diff.

Finding [0] touches the exact same code line (the sort key change) but describes the opposite direction—it treats the new lambda as a minor per-step overhead cost, not recognizing that the *old* sort caused decode misclassification and loss of the fast uniform-decode/CUDA-graph path. It misses the actual mechanism (ordering breaks split_decodes_and_prefills under spec decode). Finding [1] is an unrelated issue.
Ground truth 是这个改动带来的性能收益（跳过 fp4_gemm 的 JIT 编译以节省 warmup 时间）；findings 都在把该改动当作潜在负面/风险来评价——[0][1] 担心跳过 autotune 影响正确性或其他后端，方向相反且未识别"避免浪费 warmup JIT 编译时间"这一机制，[2] 说的是无关的模块扫描开销。无一条抓住 ground truth 的性能问题。

Finding [0] identifies the exact code change (removal of `torch.empty_like` allocation and switch from out-parameter writes to returning the tensor directly) at the correct location (Qwen3NextDecoderLayer.forward + attention sub-modules). While it emphasizes the allocation removal, it captures the same diff mechanism the ground truth is about (in-place slice write vs direct return); the location and the change direction match.

Finding 0 identifies the same mechanism and location: removing the `reasoning_config is not None` blanket condition that forced `logitsprocs_need_output_token_ids` True, causing per-request output-token-id population/sync for all reasoning-capable models. Machine and change match ground truth.

Finding [0] identifies the added dummy_run under DP>1 in the "input doesn't fit" branch, explicitly noting it carries TP/EP/DP collectives to avoid the collective-mismatch hang — mechanism and location both match the ground truth.
Ground truth 是把新增的 deepstream/NVDEC GPU 解码后端当作提升视频吞吐的性能改进（含 pinned D2H 拷贝的正向优化）。所有 findings 都在把这个新后端及其 D2H 拷贝/同步/线程池当作性能问题来批评（方向相反），而非识别出该改动本身是有益的吞吐优化。
机制吻合：finding 精确指出存储键只用前两个 ubatch 的 token 数、而 __call__ 查找键用全部，导致 >2 ubatch 时键不匹配，与 ground truth 描述一致，位置也在 _capture_ubatches。

Finding [0] identifies that the monitor wraps JITImpl.__call__ and runs per-invocation on the hot path (including cache-hit case), doing non-trivial per-call work — matching the ground-truth mechanism (the added instrumentation hook around the TileLang JIT entry points adding latency). Location and mechanism align.
Finding[0] 明确指出这些 output-copy/prepare-inputs 同步事件从默认自旋等待改为 blocking=True 以避免争用 CUDA driver lock，机制与位置都吻合 ground truth，尽管它对改动持谨慎（担心 OS 调度开销）但仍正确识别了自旋轮询 driver lock 这一核心问题。

Ground truth 是新增的 modular 变体通过 _supports_parallel_config 使 all2all EP/DP 部署能选中更快的 FlashInfer TRTLLM 融合路径（吞吐提升方向）。三条 findings 都在指该 modular 路径内部的次要开销（缺 tune_max_num_tokens、额外 copy、pack topk 内核），属于另一类/次级问题，没有触及 _supports_parallel_config 扩展路径选择这一核心机制。
检测器未输出任何实质 finding（空内容），无法命中 ground truth 所述的冗余 token→request 映射重算与 H2D 拷贝问题。
Finding[1] 准确识别出机制：将 routed_scaling_factor 折入 topk_sigmoid CUDA 内核，消除独立的 topk_weights *= 的 elementwise 算子及额外内核启动/内存往返，与 ground truth 完全吻合。虽将其描述为改进而非回归，但边界规则要求只看是否识别出问题本身，机制与位置均对得上。

Ground truth is that re-enabling the persistent work-stealing path fixes a GPU-utilization/bubble problem (the fallback non-persistent kernel was slower). Finding [1] correctly locates the removal of the use_persistent gating but frames it as a potential negative (extra get_mla_metadata_v1 launches / context lengths growing), i.e. it treats the change as introducing a problem rather than recognizing the persistent path re-enablement improves CU load balancing — direction is off and does not capture the gpu-util/bubble mechanism. Finding [0] is about minor extra CPU reductions, unrelated.

Finding [0] identifies the exact change (guard broadened from DeepEP-only to world_size>1) and its consequence—disabling the persistent cache so every rank now runs autotune, increasing warmup cost—matching the ground-truth mechanism/tradeoff at the same location. Finding [1] corroborates. Both correctly capture that all ranks redundantly autotune.

Ground truth 是一个性能改进（把多个 top-k kernel 合并为一次 sparse_topk_select，并去掉 sentinel 扫描以减少加载）。所有 findings 都是在批评新引入的统一 buffer 带来的开销（内存分配、每次 fill_、扫描全部 MAX_K_TILES），而非识别出被替换掉/合并的 top-k 机制。这属于"另一个问题/方向不符"——没有抓住 ground truth 所述的合并 top-k 与去 sentinel 的核心机制。

Ground truth 是"这个 tiling 改动通过分块限制 fp32 transient 拷贝的峰值内存（memory 问题的修复）"，而所有 findings 都把 tiling 改动当成引入了新的性能开销来批评（kernel-launch 开销、recompilation、mem_get_info 同步、per-request .item() 等），方向相反且关注 latency 而非该改动实际解决的内存峰值机制，无一条识别出"未分块时保留 8-10 份 transient 导致内存随并发扩张"这一 ground truth 机制。
Ground truth 是"将标量 libm 回退替换为真正的 SIMD 多项式实现"这一性能改进（方向：改进已有慢路径）。而 findings 全部在指出新 SIMD 实现内部的次要低效（tanh/er 中 exp() 重复计算半个 lane），是把改动当成有新问题来批评，既非同一机制也方向相反，未抓住"向量化提升吞吐"这一 ground truth。

Ground truth 是把 B12x 融合 NVFP4 MoE 后端扩展到支持 ReLU2/非门控激活（_supports_activation 与 _supports_no_act_and_mul 的改动），启用专用融合路径。两条 finding 都指向别的问题：[0] 说输出缓冲从直写变为 copy_ 拷贝开销，[1] 说 wrapper 延迟构造带来的首次调用成本——均与 ground truth 的激活支持扩展机制无关，属于"另一个问题"。

Finding [0] identifies the newly added per-decode-step hpc.assign_attention_decode_task dynamic-schedule task assignment as an added per-forward launch, which matches the ground-truth mechanism (dynamic scheduled attention workspace/task_map added to the decode path) and points to the same code in build().

Ground truth 说 Humming 被追加在优先级列表末尾，是 opt-in 更快路径，并非引入性能问题（"it does not restore performance an earlier commit broke"）。而 findings [0][2] 断言 Humming 被放在列表首位/强制选中，方向和位置都与 GT 相反；[1][3] 是模糊或另一个问题。没有一条抓住 GT 的实质判断。

Ground truth 认定该改动是一个性能改进（fused CPU 预处理消除逐像素归一化开销，是延迟收益）。所有 findings 都在指出这个新 numba kernel 内部的潜在低效（缺warmup、workqueue层慢、cache局部性差、padding清零开销），即把改动当成引入了性能问题来批评，方向与 ground truth 相反，且都不是在识别"用融合内核替代远程HF路径以降低预处理延迟"这一机制。

Ground truth 的核心是：新增的 FX fuser 框架把 q/k/v 三个独立 GEMM 融合为单个 QKVParallelLinear、GLU 融合等，闭合了原后端"更慢"的低效（正向的改进）。finding[0] 提到了 Fusers 触发 fx trace + 模式匹配，但只是把它当成新增开销的 suggestion，并未识别出"融合减少 GEMM 数量/修正 TP 分片带来吞吐提升"这一机制，方向与 ground truth 相反且未抓住问题本质；finding[1] 明确说明是移动过来的、逻辑不变、非回归，也未涉及 QKV 融合机制。均为 MISS。
Finding[0] 精确指出默认策略从 opt-in 允许列表反转为 opt-out（`not is_moe` 基本对所有 dense 模型启用 V2），机制与位置（_default_use_v2_model_runner）都与 ground truth 吻合。

Ground truth is that this commit is a throughput improvement—extending SP-MoE to the TP-only case to eliminate duplicate expert computation on replicated tokens. Finding [0] identifies the same code changes (use_ep/all2all path enabled when DP==1) but frames it as a potential regression/concern about changing the dispatch path, not as recognizing the intended reduction of duplicate work; findings [1] and [2] are minor unrelated micro-allocations. None captures the mechanism (redundant duplicate expert work/comm removed via sequence-parallel sharding).

两条 finding 方向相反：ground truth 是该 commit 用轻量 config-dict 读取替换了昂贵的 processor 初始化以修复启动耗时；而 findings 反过来批评新引入的 `get_image_processor_dict`/`get_video_processor_dict` 调用未被缓存、会重复解析/访问文件系统，把有益改动当成问题来提，属于方向相反且未识别出被修复的原始机制。
Finding[0] 准确识别出该 commit 用 MLADualRMSPerTokenQuantPattern 将 q 的 RMSNorm+FP8量化 与 kv 的 RMSNorm 两个独立 kernel 合并为单个 fused kernel，以减少 kernel 启动——机制与位置均与 ground truth 吻合。

Ground truth 是这个 commit "启用" 了 DSD 的 full cudagraph（去掉 PIECEWISE 降级、按每个 decode_query_len 捕获 FULL 图以消除 piecewise 开销），是一处性能改进。而所有 findings 都把该改动描述为引入新的开销（捕获图数量增多、dedup O(n) 扫描、dispatch 循环变长），方向与 ground truth 相反，且没有识别出 PIECEWISE 降级被跳过这一核心机制。

Ground truth 是把 SM90 解码路由到更快的 XQA 内核这一吞吐量改进。findings 全都指向该 diff 里的其他次要问题（共享 workspace buffer、重复调用 get_q_data_type/supports_sink、functools.cache 键翻倍、has_nvidia_artifactory 网络请求），没有一条识别出 XQA 决定路由的核心机制——属于"另一个问题"类，判 MISS。
机制吻合：finding 明确指出 sliding_window 需除以 block_pool_size，且未修正前 KV cache 管理器把窗口当成 block_pool_size 倍大，导致多预留同样倍数的块——与 ground truth 的机制和位置完全一致。
机制与位置吻合：finding 明确指出新增的 `and not current_platform.is_device_capability_family(120)` 使 SM120 上禁用 cooperative top-K 内核并回退到 persistent top-K 路径，与 ground truth 的改动和机制一致。
Finding[0] 精确指出移除 tune_max_num_tokens=max(self.max_capture_size,1) 使 FlashInfer 回退到默认调优边界，机制与位置均与 ground truth 吻合（autotune token 边界影响 kernel 配置选择）。
Finding [1] 准确指出单节点默认融合 allreduce 后端从 trtllm 翻转为 mnnvl，位置与机制吻合，并指向 per-step allreduce+RMSNorm 延迟变化，正是 ground truth 描述的默认后端切换。

Ground truth 说这个改动是为 ARM 引入更快的 NEON tanhf kernel 来加速 GELU-tanh（一个性能改进）。所有 findings 都在把该改动的某些细节当成引入的性能问题（如阻止 torch.compile 融合、跨lane 归约延迟、常量重载、每次分配等），方向与 ground truth 相反——ground truth 并未标注这些为问题，而是说这是加速。没有一条 finding 抓住"这是加速 GELU 的优化"这一实质。
Ground truth 是"重新启用 aiter fused kernel 恢复更快路径"（一个性能改进/恢复）。Finding [0] 方向相反，把改动理解为强制走 unfused 慢路径；[1] 是无关的冗余计算评论；[2] 认出了 aiter 重新启用的背景，但方向相反——把它当作潜在准确性风险而非恢复更快 kernel 的性能改进，未指出这是恢复吞吐的性能问题机制。

Finding [0] identifies the host-blocking torch.cuda.current_stream().synchronize() in _sync_dbo_comm_if_needed after HT dispatch/combine under ROCm+DBO—matching ground-truth mechanism (2), the serializing sync that defeats DBO overlap. Findings [1] and [2] additionally cover comm_sms=0 and async_scheduling=False, aligning with mechanisms (3) and (1).

Finding [0] identifies the per-call nccl_symm_mem_context snapshot + window-registration scan overhead on the AllGather symm-mem path—exactly the mechanism the scratch-buffer optimization addresses (paying the snapshot/registration scan once vs. every collective). Machine, location, and direction all match.

Finding [0] correctly identifies that this revert reintroduces synchronous blocking host-memory pinning (cudaHostRegister) on the worker init path, replacing the background CPUTensorPinThread—the exact mechanism and location the ground truth describes, with correct symptom (worker init / startup time).

Ground truth is that this change ADDS warmup infrastructure to fix first-request JIT-compile stalls (a performance improvement). Finding [0] identifies the warmup mechanism and CuTeDSL compilation correctly, but frames it as a problem/cost (compile overhead at startup) rather than recognizing it as removing hot-path latency; it does not identify the actual perf issue being solved (lazy JIT compile stalls on first serving request). Both findings treat the improvement as a concern, so direction is off.

Ground truth 是"新增一个可选的更快的 HPC 融合注意力后端（fused RoPE+QK-Norm+KV-write + FP8 Q quant）"这一附加的加速路径。而所有 findings 都是在这个新后端内部挑通用反模式（每步分配 arange、循环内 import、float32 cos/sin cache、torch.empty 分配），方向相反——它们把这个本意为提速的改动当成引入了性能问题，且没有一条识别出"这是一个加速性后端"这一核心机制。

两条 finding 都指向了正确的代码位置（weightless 路径合成 torch.ones weight），但方向相反：ground truth 认为该改动是性能改进（用单一 fused 内核替换未融合的 eager 路径和冗余 copy），而 findings 把它当作引入的性能问题（每次调用分配 ones、多做乘 1.0），并未识别出被替换的 eager 路径/冗余 copy 才是原问题。属于方向相反。
两条 finding 都把新增的 warmup 本身当作"启动时开销"来抱怨（跑太多 case、无条件为所有模型执行），而 ground truth 的机制恰恰相反：这些 warmup 是为了避免首次请求时的 Triton JIT 编译内联开销，是有益改动。finding 方向与 ground truth 相反，且未识别出"缺乏 warmup 会导致首 token JIT 延迟尖峰"这一机制。

Finding [0] identifies the exact change (adding EMULATION to the auto priority list in _get_priority_backends_for_gpt_oss) and the mechanism (auto path now selects the slow emulation experts running dequant every forward), matching ground truth's throughput problem.

Ground truth 是：热路径上每次 forward_mqa 都用 torch.empty 分配 attn_logits scratch，改为预留共享 workspace 以消除 per-call GPU 分配。三条 findings 都基于改动后的 workspace 版本讨论其他风险（并发/多流安全性、worst-case 显存占用、reserve 与运行时 shape 不一致），没有一条指出"原先的 per-call 分配在 decode 热路径上造成延迟"这一被修复的问题；且方向上多为质疑改动，而非识别被消除的性能问题。

Finding [2] identifies the same change locus (kkt/uw kernel launch, min_blocks_per_mp=1) and the occupancy/per-SM control mechanism the ground truth centers on. Though it frames it as a caution, it correctly pins the specific diff element (min_blocks_per_mp and block sizing for this newly-added kkt kernel).

Ground truth is that this commit eliminates redundant collective comm by replacing o_proj's all_reduce + chunk with a single reduce_scatter (a beneficial change). None of the findings identify this mechanism; instead they flag other purported overheads (all-gather on non-SP input, per-layer padding, doubled-width all-gather, aux-layer all-gather) — all "another problem," and some effectively treat the SP path as adding cost rather than recognizing the comm-reduction benefit.
Finding [0] 准确识别出本次改动重新启用了 FlashInfer 持久化 autotune 缓存 (use_persistent_cache=True)，还原了 #43119 的 guard，并点明了原 TODO 中的 use_8x4_sf_layout 缓存冲突问题——机制与位置均吻合 ground truth 的启动期 autotune 冗余重复问题。
Ground truth 只是新增一个可选的 HPC fused-MoE 快路径（新特性，非既有回退），而三条 findings 都在指出该新路径内部的具体潜在问题（未注册 custom op、workspace 尺寸、chunking 重复调用开销），没有一条抓住"这是引入新后端/新快路径"这一本质。均属另一个问题层面。

机制吻合：finding 正确识别出 or→and 的改动，指出旧的 `is_static_int8_in or is_static_int8_out` 使 W8A8 模型错误匹配 WNA8O8Int 而非 fused int8 GEMM，位置与 ground truth 同处 `_is_wNa8o8_int` 谓词。虽然它把改动描述为"恢复性能的 bugfix"，但这与 ground truth 方向一致（该 commit 正是修复），并非把有害改动当成改进。

Finding [1] identifies the dual-path CUDA graph change and its location, but frames it as a downside (more captured graphs / more GPU memory & warm-up cost), i.e. the opposite direction—it does not recognize that the change reduces wasted zero-padded encoder compute and improves packing. Finding [0] is an unrelated property-recompute concern. Neither captures the ground-truth mechanism/direction.

Ground truth 是关于新增 encoder CUDA Graph 支持以消除 kernel launch 开销（是个有益改动/性能优化）。三条 findings 都在挑该实现里的其他潜在问题（缺 path 参数、逐 batch 的 Python 前缀和、padding 处理），无一识别出 GT 所述的 CUDA Graph 消除 launch overhead 这一核心机制/方向——属于另一个问题，方向也不吻合。

Ground truth 描述的是引入一条融合快路径（fused kernels + fused all-reduce/RMSNorm + skip 冗余）作为延迟优化。所有 findings 都把这些改动当作潜在的正确性/风险问题来评论（fast path 不可用时的回退、eager 捕获区域、dummy cache 泄漏、skip_final_all_reduce 的正确性），方向与 ground truth 相反——没有一条把这些改动识别为"抓住延迟优化机制"的性能判断，属于另一个问题/方向不符。

Finding[0] identifies the perf-relevant piece: prepare_forward is now on every forward pass and calls compute_hash_cached(model_config) as a per-forward hot path. Mechanism and location match the ground truth's genuine perf concern.
Finding[1] 机制吻合：识别出 with_gpu_sync_check 对 execute_model/sample_tokens 的包装及每步的 set_sync_debug_mode 开销，并正确指出 env 未设时返回原函数、零开销（默认路径不变），与 ground truth 描述一致。

Finding [0] correctly locates the weight/scale shuffle change to the AITER-native interleaved layout, but frames it as a one-time per-load preprocessing cost (suggestion severity) rather than identifying it as the throughput-improving change (the ground truth is that this change improves MoE GEMM throughput). It doesn't identify the actual perf mechanism/direction—it treats the change as a possible cost, not the intended throughput win. Finding [1] flags the env var as a side-effect concern, unrelated to the throughput mechanism.

Finding [3] identifies MultiModalGPUMemoryPool.acquire() blocking on the semaphore so concurrent video requests serialize on GPU memory budget — mechanism and location match the ground-truth blocking byte-counting admission-control pool. Findings [0]/[1] correctly identify the retained-decoder-slot serialization, which is the other half of the same GT work.
Finding 只讨论了一处 GateMode import 被移出条件分支导致每次调用都执行的问题，属于另一个问题，且方向偏"多余开销"；未识别 ground truth 的核心机制——将 SWIGLUOAI_UNINTERLEAVE 加入 AiterExperts 支持列表以启用融合 MoE 快速路径（含 intermediate_pad 与 GateMode 提示）。

Finding [2] identifies the exact change: get_default_config now sets block_n=64 and num_stages=4/3 for M<=8 when block_shape[0]%64==0 on CUDA SM90 — same mechanism, location, and CUDA-only scope as the ground truth. It frames it as a device-generalization caveat rather than praise, but it clearly pins down the specific tile/pipeline change introduced by this diff.

Ground truth 是把 shared expert 融入 routed grouped GEMM 以消除单独 dense-MLP 的 kernel 启动，这是一个性能改进；两条 finding 都是在挑融合实现里可能新增的开销（每次 forward 重新分配/拼接张量、bin 数量增大导致 padding），指的是"这个改动引入的次要开销"，而非识别出 ground truth 所描述的融合优化机制本身。方向与机制均不吻合。

Finding[1] identifies the exact mechanism and location: the new WVSPLIT_TILE macro's gfx1151 branch selecting tuned YTILE/UNRL configs based on K_in thresholds, sYT and fit_lds — same code change and heuristic as the ground truth. Direction is on the perf-tuning heuristic itself.
Ground truth 是把 RoPE+量化+权重缩放融合进一个 Triton kernel 并合并 GEMM 的正向优化；而所有 findings 都把这个新融合 kernel 及其周边操作当作性能问题来挑刺（num_warps=1 利用率低、丢弃张量分配、多余 concat），方向相反且指的是"融合引入的开销"而非识别出这是提升吞吐的优化，没有一条抓住 ground truth 的机制。

Ground truth is about the swap-AB path improving tensor-core/MMA utilization for small-M tiles (a throughput optimization). The finding instead flags increased kernel-cache specialization / JIT compilation cost — a different concern, not the tensor-core utilization mechanism, so it misses the actual point of the change.

Ground truth 说的是新增 fused kernel 相比旧的 dequantize_to_dtype() 全权重反量化路径是性能改进（消除了额外的 HBM 读写）。而 findings 都在批评这个新 fused kernel（重复解码、tiling 配置不匹配、interleave 增加寄存器开销等），方向相反——把这个有益改动当作性能问题来指摘，没有识别出 GT 所指的"消除全权重反量化"这一改进机制。
Finding [0] 准确指向该 commit 的改动：对首次 decode（num_new_tokens==1）的请求填充到 1+num_spec_tokens 并插入 -1 占位 spec token，机制与位置吻合。虽然它把此改动描述为引入额外计算开销而非强调保留 cudagraph 的意图，但识别出的正是同一处代码与同一机制。

Finding[0] identifies exactly the ground-truth change—enabling FlashInfer fused allreduce at world_size=16 by adding 16 to FI_SUPPORTED_WORLD_SIZES and the 64MB entry in FI_ALLREDUCE_FUSION_MAX_SIZE_MB—in the same files/hunks. Mechanism and location match; the extra note about a missing entry doesn't disqualify it.

Ground truth 是这个 commit 引入的性能改进（新增 16 字节向量化路径提升带宽利用率、移除慢速通用 sum 回退）。三条 findings 都是把该改动当作既成事实，然后挑其中某些子路径的小缺点（标量回退占用率低、动态 kernel 未展开、fp32 转换开销），全部标注为 suggestion 且方向与 ground truth 相反——它们没有识别出"这是提升吞吐的优化"，而是在挑优化中的边角问题。属于方向/另一个问题，判 MISS。
Ground truth 关注的是新增 RVV SIMD 内核替换标量三重循环这一新后端加速（本身不是回归修复）；而所有 findings 都是在假定该内核已存在的前提下，挑其内部的微优化问题（重复 load、zero-point 未提升、M 循环未复用、vl 固定等），属于"另一个问题"的方向，没有抓住 ground truth 所述的机制。

Finding [0] identifies the exact PDL mechanism at the correct location—the per_token_group_quant_8bit_kernel using cudaTriggerProgrammaticLaunchCompletion() / PDL, matching ground truth's PDL enablement. Finding [1] also correctly identifies the cudaLaunchKernelEx switch at the same site.

Ground truth 是 INT3 codec 的 pack/unpack 开销在 TP4/TP8 上超过通信收益（故仅限 TP2）。findings 都在描述 CodecQ3 内部实现细节（标量位移/字节存储/转换开销），虽然沾到"pack/unpack 开销"这一侧，但没有指出该开销与 world_size 相关、需限于 TP2 这一核心权衡机制，且都是 suggestion 级的通用低效评论，未针对 GT 的 TP 门控问题作出实质判断。

Ground truth 是修复 AMX varlen conv kernel 使其支持 has_initial_state，从而移除禁用 prefix caching/chunked prefill 的块以恢复吞吐。Finding[2] 提到了移除禁用块并识别这是恢复功能，但方向相反——它把该改动当作激活了新的性能问题（per-step KV 清零、batch-memcpy），而非识别出这是恢复吞吐的性能改进；其余 finding 指向的是无关的通用反模式，未触及 conv kernel / has_initial_state 机制。
Finding [1] 机制吻合：明确指出 cudaHostRegister 页锁定大内存区域会阻塞/同步 CUDA 上下文，且原本在 worker init 期间同步执行、现在被移到后台线程——正是 ground truth 的启动阻塞问题与后台线程重叠改动，位置与方向都对。

Finding [1] correctly describes the exact mechanism and location (delta storage via mask_num/_saved_offset, iterating only new suffix instead of all chunks), but frames it as "a net performance improvement" — i.e. it praises the change rather than identifying the pre-commit O(prefix) work as the problem the commit fixes. Per the direction rule, dumping the fix as a positive is a MISS.

Finding 0 identifies the exact change (removing `or current_platform.is_xpu()`) and the mechanism—XPU runs FA2 (version !=3) so _cudagraph_support drops from ALWAYS, changing the cudagraph capability path. Machine, location, and direction all match the ground truth.

Ground truth 是新增 FLASH_ATTN_MLA_SPARSE 稀疏 MLA 解码后端（top-k KV 子集降低长上下文注意力开销）这一新特性/新路径；而 findings 关注的是 forward_mqa 里 torch.arange 构造 cu_seqlens_q 的每层重复分配问题，属于同文件里的另一个问题，未识别 top-k 稀疏注意力这一核心机制，判 MISS（另一个问题）。

Finding [0] correctly identifies the exact mechanism and location: the new FlashInferCutedslMxfp8LinearKernel being inserted at the front of _POSSIBLE_MXFP8_KERNELS[CUDA], making it the preferred MXFP8 GEMM path ahead of the CUTLASS kernel on SM100/SM103 hardware—matching the ground truth's dispatch/ordering mechanism.

Finding [0] correctly identifies the new monitor that hooks CuTeDSL/Triton compilation and raises/warns on post-warmup JIT compilations indicating cache misses/unexpected shapes causing latency spikes — same mechanism and location (the new _setup_cutedsl_jit_hook wrapping cute.compile) as the ground truth.

Ground truth 的核心是新增 INT4_PER_TOKEN_HEAD KV cache 量化模式将每 token/head 存储减半（head_dim=head_size//2），减少显存占用的额外能力。三条 findings 都在讨论该特性的内部细节（kernel 双累加器寄存器开销、scale 存储 6% 开销、fill_ 非连续写入），全部把这个新特性当成潜在开销/反模式来批评，方向相反且未识别出"减半 KV 存储降低显存"这一实质机制。
检测器没有输出任何实质 finding（空），无法命中 ground truth 关于 Mamba 稀疏保留机制的性能问题。
Ground truth 是这个优化改动"节省了"padding token 的 dispatch/GEMM，是有益改动；而所有 findings 都把改动引入的 torch.where/fill/内存分配当成新的性能开销（方向相反），没有一条识别出"跳过 padding token 节省算力/通信"这一被优化的问题机制。

Finding [0] identifies the maybe_roundup_sizes override that rounds hidden_size/intermediate_size up to block_size (128) to make weights block-aligned — same mechanism and location as ground truth; finding [1] also correctly notes the _zero_padding of padded regions.

Finding [0] identifies the exact mechanism—zero-padding the MoE intermediate dimension up to the next valid Marlin thread tile (lcm(64, group_size)) so tile-misaligned intermediates can run the fused Marlin MoE path—matching the ground truth's marlin_moe_padded_intermediate change in the same file/functions.

Finding [0] identifies the exact location (the added cuMemAddressFree + re-reservation in python_unmap_and_release) but frames it backwards — treating the fix as an "extra overhead" of two driver calls, rather than recognizing it as the mechanism that actually reclaims resident VRAM that sleep mode previously failed to free. Direction is inverted relative to ground truth (which is about memory not being reclaimed). Findings [1]/[2] concern gc.collect/teardown, a different concern.

Ground truth 是这个 commit 新增 cluster-cooperative topK 内核以加速低延迟解码路径——本质是一处优化。三条 findings 都是在挑剔新增内核的各种 host-side 开销（每次 launch 设属性、查设备属性、workspace 获取），指向的是"这个改动本身可能引入的小额外开销"，而不是识别出 GT 所描述的性能优化机制；方向和机制都对不上，判 MISS。

Finding [1] correctly identifies the same mechanism as ground truth: the power-of-2 rounding bounds distinct num_max_tokens_per_rank values to ~log2(max_num_batched_tokens), capping DeepEP dispatch-kernel JIT recompiles — exactly the fix's rationale (avoiding the JIT recompilation/cicc storm), located at the same do_expand=False dispatch path.

Finding [1] identifies the introduction of the dedicated request runtime (min(available_parallelism,32) workers) alongside HTTP and ZMQ runtimes—the exact architectural change GT describes for offloading CPU-heavy request preparation off the HTTP runtime. Though framed around thread count, it correctly locates and understands the mechanism (separating request runtime, ZMQ runtime, HTTP runtime). It's borderline (the finding treats it as a mild cost rather than the latency benefit), but it does grasp the same change and mechanism.
Finding [0] identifies the exact mechanism: per-video str.replace on a growing prompt is O(len(prompt)), giving quadratic behavior—matching the ground truth location and mechanism precisely.
The detector produced no findings (empty), so nothing identifies the blocking synchronous ZMQ lookup on the scheduler thread.
Finding 指出改动将 inline system 消息从合并后的前置位置移回原始位置，正是 ground truth 描述的机制与位置（system 消息位置/前缀重排影响 prefix caching），机制与位置吻合。

Finding [3] identifies both mechanisms of the ground truth: the compact single-digest chunk keying replacing scale_factor concatenation (reducing key length, 64x for 256/4) and the raw wire format dropping msgpack encode/decode—matching the two latent inefficiencies at the correct location.
No findings were produced, so nothing could capture the non_blocking H2D copy on pageable memory issue.

Ground truth 只是标注该 commit 引入了一个全新的 NVFP4 GEMM 快速路径（新增 backend），并非一个可确指的性能缺陷。各 finding 指出的是把新 kernel 放在自动选择列表首位（default）、缺少预量化复用、pattern 匹配增加编译时间等——这些是检测器自行推断的潜在问题，与 ground truth"新增快速路径本身"这一描述不吻合，属另一个/泛泛的问题；且 ground truth 本身不足以判定某条具体缺陷。

Finding [0] correctly identifies the revert re-adding @eager_break_during_capture on DeepseekV4Attention.attention_impl and explains the eager graph break mechanism during cudagraph capture—same file, same change, same mechanism as ground truth.

Finding [0] identifies the exact mechanism: reverting PDL removes griddepcontrol.wait/launch_dependents and cudaLaunchKernelEx programmatic stream serialization, disabling kernel launch overlap in the per-token-group FP8 quant kernel—matching the ground truth's launch-overlap/inter-kernel bubble regression.

Ground truth 的核心是把 NIXL zero-copy RDMA-READ 通信器设为默认（config/parallel.py 的 communicator 选择及移除对 async EPLB 的硬性阻塞）。所有 findings 都在批评该 PR 附带引入的其他机制（每层 all_reduce 同步 rebalanced 标志、drain_async 忙等轮询、defer_remote_setup 延迟元数据交换），指的是不同的问题，且方向是把这些当成新引入的开销，而非识别出 NIXL 默认化这一改动本身。属于"另一个问题"。

Ground truth is that this diff introduces a new RVV fast-path kernel that improves throughput (a beneficial hardware-specific addition, not a regression). All three findings treat the new RVV kernel as containing sub-optimalities (redundant A reloads, scalar fallback conversion, non-widened tile) — these are internal micro-optimizations of the added kernel, not identifications of the actual "problem" (which is the introduction of the fast path itself). None matches the ground-truth mechanism/direction.

Finding 0 identifies the same change (removing the PP>1 gate in enable_allreduce_rms_fusion) and references the fused op's GPU-side peer-signal spin-wait mechanism, matching the ground-truth root cause and location.

Finding[0] precisely identifies the retag from kFp8StaticTokenSym to kFp8StaticChannelSym, notes it is passed to init_fp8_linear_kernel as weight_quant_key, and drives GEMM path selection—matching the ground-truth mechanism and location exactly.

Ground truth 是把每层分散的 KVCacheTensor 重打包为单块连续 backing，从而让 NIXL 每块 1 个描述符注册并提升局部性——这是一个性能优化。而所有 findings 都把这个 packed 布局当作潜在问题来审视（[0] 描述新布局的机制但作为"隐患"、[1]/[2] 都是低严重度的假设性顾虑），方向相反：没有一条把该改动识别为对应 ground truth 的性能优化。判 MISS。
Finding[1] 指向 CPU rms_norm/fused_add_rms_norm 内层循环的 weight 处理，识别出 has_weight 分支应用 constexpr/template 而非运行时判断——正是 ground truth 中"用 if constexpr(HasWeight) 跳过 weight 加载+乘法"的机制与位置，方向一致。

Findings focus on the 2-way vs 3-way parallel overlap change during capture, but miss the core ground-truth mechanism: removing the `@eager_break_during_capture` decorator from `attention_impl` to narrow the eager break to only the inner sparse_attn_indexer, reducing CUDA graph fragmentation/launch overhead. This is a related-but-different aspect of the same diff, not the primary latency/TTFT mechanism.

Ground truth is that the commit fuses N per-group kernel launches into one, reducing launch overhead (a performance improvement). All three findings treat the new fused code as introducing overhead (extra pinned memory, list rebuilding, per-program indirect loads) rather than recognizing the elimination of N-1 kernel launches; none identifies the launch-overhead reduction mechanism. Wrong direction / different concerns.

Finding [1] identifies the core restructuring: grid_score dropping the per-token dimension (now (num_reqs, num_kv_chunks) instead of (batch, num_kv_chunks)) and the chunk-count scaling change from batch*num_idx_heads to seq_lens.shape[0] — matching the ground-truth mechanism of one CTA per request processing a full query tile.

Finding [0] identifies the exact mechanism: the prefill cadence (prefill_schedule_interval / _should_throttle_prefills) defers new prefills and in-flight chunked-prefill chunks on non-cadence-aligned steps in DP deployments—same code and same intended behavior as the ground truth's prefill alignment across DP ranks.

Ground truth 的机制是被丢弃的 register_bytecode_hook 句柄导致全局 dynamo hook 持有模型、泄漏 GPU 显存，修复靠捕获 handle 并在 finalizer 中 remove。Finding[0] 说的是 weakref.finalize 把 model 作为参数持有强引用，虽沾到 finalizer/model 保活但机制不同（不是 bytecode hook 未 remove），且方向相反地把修复代码当成问题；Finding[1] 讲 torch._dynamo.reset 导致重编译，属于另一个问题。均未抓住 register_bytecode_hook 句柄未释放这一核心机制。

Ground truth 的核心是：为 MoonViT 实现 SupportsEncoderCudaGraph 协议以启用 CUDA graph 捕获/回放来消除内核启动气泡，关键机制是把 max_seqlen 改为预计算张量避免 GPU 标量破坏捕获。所有 findings 都在挑剔新引入的 CUDA graph 辅助函数里的次要开销（合成 grid buffer、CPU 上的 .item()、numpy 循环、torch.cat 拷贝），是"另一个问题"而非识别这一优化本身；无一条抓住去除 graph-incompatible 操作以减少启动气泡这一主机制。

Finding [1] directly addresses the regime-gated launch tile change (prefill 128x256, num_stages=2) that is the core of the ground truth—the mechanism (tile/warp/stage sizing affecting occupancy/MFU on CDNA4/gfx950) and location (the MXFP8 tile config change) both match. Findings [0] and [2] discuss token-count vs per-expert routing and padding, which are adjacent but frame the change as a potential problem rather than the throughput-tuning improvement; [1] captures the actual tile-config mechanism.
Finding 直接指向 XPU 的 SequenceParallelismPass 阈值 (min_hidden_size=4096, min_per_gpu_size_mb=8.0) 及 AllReduce→ReduceScatter+local RMSNorm+AllGather 的重写机制，与 ground truth 的位置与机制吻合。

Finding [0] precisely identifies the removal of AsyncMicrobatchTokenizer's micro-batching (32 requests / 2ms window coalescing) as the throughput mechanism, matching the ground truth in both location and mechanism.

Finding [0] identifies the exact mechanism and location: free_blocks() now prepends hashless blocks and appends hashed blocks, replacing the uniform-LRU append path—matching the ground-truth split policy in block_pool.free_blocks. Note: this is described as a change from a hit-rate-preserving policy; regardless, the mechanism and location fit.

Finding [0] identifies the exact mechanism: the switch to ParallelLoader with the VLLM_FASTSAFETENSORS_QUEUE_SIZE env var gating producer/consumer pipelining that overlaps preparing the next shard's device buffer with consumption to cut load time — same code, same mechanism as ground truth.
Finding [2] 精确指出了 gelu_tanh_and_mul 中标量 std::tanh 循环被替换为向量化 Sleef_tanhf16_u10 调用，机制与位置与 ground truth 完全吻合（识别出标量 tanh 破坏 SIMD 这一瓶颈）。

Finding [0] correctly identifies the mechanism: enabling VLLM_TRITON_FORCE_FIRST_CONFIG replaces Autotuner.run to pick the first valid config instead of benchmarking for the fastest, at the correct location—matching the ground truth's core behavior and the caveat that the first-valid config may not be fastest.

Ground truth 的问题是该 commit 引入 dual-path CUDA graph 捕获/回放来消除 vision encoder 的 host 端 kernel launch 开销；三条 findings 分别指向 GPU 张量的 D2H 同步、tensor 而非 int 的传播、property 重复计算等次要反模式，均是 diff 里的另一类问题，未触及 dual-path graph 捕获/回放这一核心机制。

Finding 0 identifies the exact new swap_ab dispatch path selected on a.size(0)%4!=0, the Shape<_128,_16,_128> tile and pingpong scheduler for small M — matching the ground-truth mechanism and location precisely.

Ground truth 是"新版 get_prefill_chunk_plan 相比固定分块+最坏情况 workspace 分配，产生更少、更贴合尺寸的 chunk，从而提升吞吐"——即这个改动是性能改进。两条 finding 都把新方法当作性能问题来批评（[0] 说每层重复调用，[1] 说 .item() 循环开销），指向的是新方法引入的其他潜在开销，而非 ground truth 所述的正向机制，方向相反/另一个问题。
Ground truth 是新增 Helion 量化 kernel 作为可调优的更快 quant 路径（throughput 意图）。两条 findings 都指向次要问题——import 时的 eager 注册开销和 pick_config 缓存的 None 处理，均未识别到该 diff 引入的核心 kernel 性能路径，属于"另一个问题/泛泛"，方向也不吻合。

Ground truth 是：V2 Model Runner 缺少 LoRA 维度导致无法为 LoRA 捕获/分派 cudagraph、被迫退回 eager——即这是修复引入的性能改进机制。findings 全部把新增的 num_active_loras 维度当成新引入的开销来批评（[0] 每步的 dict/set 遍历、[1] 捕获图数量倍增、[2] 线性扫描、[3] warmup 反复 add/remove LoRA），方向相反，把有益改动当成性能问题，且都未识别出"此前 LoRA 因缺少维度被迫 eager"这一核心机制。

Ground truth 关注的是 DSD 通过按 batch size 调 K 来避免 BS*K 超过临界点损害 decode 吞吐这一机制本身。findings 都指向 DSD 相关代码的其他细节（每步重分配 placeholder 列表[0]、强制 PIECEWISE cudagraph[1]、lookup 索引语义[2]），均为另一个/边缘问题，没有一条抓住"K 随 batch size 缩放以控制验证批量吞吐"的核心机制。
Ground truth 是"新增 CUDA graph 捕获/回放 ViT 以消除 per-kernel 启动开销"这一改进。两条 finding 都指向该改动附带方法里的次要反模式（.tolist() 同步、torch.cat 拷贝），属于另一个问题，未识别出 GT 所描述的 encoder CUDA graph 机制本身，且方向也不是评价该核心改动。

两条 finding 都是在讨论新引入的 ThreadPoolExecutor/semaphore 方案的次要细节（worker 上限过小、get_event_loop 弃用开销），而非识别出 ground truth 的核心问题——原先 CPU 密集的音频预处理内联在 async 方法里阻塞事件循环、串行化请求。方向甚至相反（把新方案当作已存在并挑其小毛病），未抓住"sync-in-async 阻塞事件循环"这一机制。

Ground truth 的问题是旧代码用 Python 逐序列 SDPA 循环导致 prefill/encoder 延迟高，本 commit 改用融合 C++ 内核是性能改进。所有 findings 方向相反——它们把新引入的 fused-kernel/encoder cache 路径当作可能的性能开销来质疑（分配、reshape_and_cache、.item()），而非识别出被移除的 SDPA 循环才是性能瓶颈；且均为 suggestion 级泛泛提示。

两条 finding 都识别到了 wo_a 缓存机制，但方向相反/关注点不同：finding[0] 把每步 dequant 改为缓存视为增加了常驻内存的代价（关注 memory 权衡，而非把重算当性能问题肯定），finding[1] 讨论的是缓存失效导致的正确性问题。均未指出 ground truth 的核心——每 decode step 重复 dequant/inverse-RoPE 造成 latency 的性能缺陷，也未提及 RoPE 的 eager 小算子链问题。
Finding [1] 准确描述了机制：watermark 仅对 WAITING/PREEMPTED 请求且已有请求调度时生效，要求 num_blocks_to_allocate + watermark_blocks 空闲块，位置和逻辑与 ground truth 完全吻合。

Ground truth 的核心机制是用 fused Triton kernel 替换 eager 的 ~6 个小 kernel 序列以降低 kernel-launch 开销；finding[0] 把 @support_torch_compile 装饰器的移除当成引入性能问题来判（方向相反——该 commit 恰恰把 breakable-cudagraph 作为受支持路径并用 fused kernel 优化），且未指出 fused RMSNorm 这一核心机制；finding[1] 是另一处无关的 hc_post 调用。均未抓住本问题。

Finding [0] correctly identifies the same change: marlin_padded_nk zero-pads tile-misaligned (N,K) shapes so they run on the fast Marlin kernel, with per-forward activation-pad/output-slice costs — matching the ground-truth mechanism and location.

Finding [0] identifies exactly the split-K decode path adding _sparse_attn_decode_partial_kernel + reduce kernel with the _decode_num_splits heuristic, and points at the GPU-util/latency-bound trade-off — same mechanism and location as the ground truth.

Finding [0] identifies the same change—rejecting torch_nccl/pynccl EPLB communicators with async EPLB and removing the DeepEP-low-latency env override—at the same location, matching the ground-truth mechanism about NCCL multi-stream conflicts with async EPLB.

Ground truth is that BEFORE this fix, per-remote-engine state leaked unboundedly and the fix adds TTL eviction. All three findings treat the fix's new code (eviction/TTL) as potentially problematic (overhead, lazy reclaim), rather than identifying the original unbounded accumulation leak — direction is inverted and none captures the leak mechanism the commit resolves.

Ground truth is that this commit ADDS release_device_memory_under_pressure() to FIX a memory-thrashing problem on UMA GPUs (cached reserved buffers starving the OS). The findings instead treat the newly added function as introducing per-module overhead (sync/empty_cache cost, is_integrated_gpu checks, memory queries) — i.e. they critique the fix rather than identify the memory problem it solves. This is a direction mismatch / another (perf-overhead) issue, not the target memory problem.

Finding [0] identifies the exact change: the synchronous os.path.exists() lookup on the tier managers being converted to an async batched lookup, which is precisely the ground-truth mechanism (moving blocking existence-check I/O off the critical path and batching it).
Finding[1] 准确识别了 Marconi 准入分支在 _mamba_block_aligned_split 中把 num_new_tokens 缩减到 block-aligned 的共享前缀长度这一机制与位置，与 ground truth 完全吻合。
Finding correctly identifies the new fused-MoE autotune config file for E=512/N=128 fp8_w8a8 [128,128] on H100 with the specific per-batch entries, matching the ground truth mechanism and location.

Finding [0] precisely identifies the mechanism: removing `_get_max_encoder_tokens` restores the pooled token count (256) vs pre-pooling patch count, feeding into memory profiling — matches ground truth mechanism and location.

所有 finding 都把这个新增分支和 find_longest_cache_hit_per_group 当作引入的微小开销（多余的谓词、重建列表、重复 record），方向相反——它们把改动看成潜在开销，而没有识别出 ground truth 的机制：原先联合前缀缓存查询被 Mamba 组的 0 命中拖累导致全量 KV 重传，新逻辑按组取 max 命中来减少传输字节。属于"另一个问题/方向相反"。

Ground truth 的核心是通过 retention_interval 稀疏化 SWA tail 块、减少写入 Mooncake store 的块数量（footprint/内存 I/O 缩减）。两条 finding 都指向了同一段 store_mask/reachable_block_mask 代码，但方向相反且机制不同：它们把这次改动当成引入了额外开销（去掉快速路径、每次分配 list、manager 查找），而没有识别出 retention_interval 稀疏化写入以减少存储体积这一实际机制。属于"另一个问题/方向不符"。
Finding [0] 精准指出该 commit 回退了 warp-shuffle 优化、恢复共享内存 log2 树形归约并重新引入 __syncthreads，机制与位置均与 ground truth 吻合；[1] 也命中向量化 I/O 退回标量加载这一子机制。

两条 finding 都在讨论新增的预留计算（_inflight_prefill_reserved_blocks / _request_remaining_blocks）本身的重复计算开销，把它当成一个 O(n) 的性能开销问题，而非识别出 ground truth 的核心：这段代码是为修复异步 KV load 的互相锁死死锁（mutual block-wedge deadlock/hang）而引入的准入门控。方向和机制都不吻合——它们在质疑修复代码的性能开销，而非抓住 hang 死锁问题。
Ground truth 是这个新 fusion pattern 消除单独 kernel launch/中间张量、提升 GPU 利用率的收益机制；而 finding 讲的是"注册的 pattern 数量翻倍"（编译期开销/注册数），方向和机制都不吻合，且并未指出该改动带来的运行时性能收益或对应问题。

Ground truth 描述的性能收益是"新增三个融合 pattern，把 all_reduce->rms_norm->fp8 quant 合成一个 AITER kernel，消除额外 kernel 启动和中间读写"。所有 findings 都把这些新增融合当成潜在性能问题（每次调用重算 1/2-stage 启发式、zeros_like memset、weight.to、bf16 数值一致性），即方向相反——它们质疑这个本质上有益的融合改动，而没有识别出 ground truth 的核心机制（融合减少 kernel 启动/中间张量）。均判 MISS。

Ground truth 的问题是原始 eager 分离算子路径带来的多次 kernel launch/内存往返延迟，而该 commit 通过融合 Triton kernel 修复它。三条 finding 都在批评融合 kernel 本身的次要开销（权重重算、占用率低、rotary 重载），属于对改动引入的其他问题的评论，没有一条识别出"用融合替代多次 eager launch 以降低延迟"这一核心机制，方向与目标问题不吻合。

Ground truth 认为该 split_non_spec 改动是性能改进（把 1-token decode 从重量级 chunk kernel 分流到轻量 recurrent kernel，使 chunk kernel 少干活）。而所有 findings 都把这个改动当成引入开销的问题：finding[2] 甚至方向相反，认为拆成两个 kernel 调用比整批走 chunk 更慢；其余为 torch.cat 拷贝、indexing 细节等另外的问题。没有一条识别出 ground truth 所述的性能收益机制，方向相反/另一个问题。

Ground truth 是"MTP step 0 计算 top-k、steps 1+ 复用共享 buffer 以避免每步冗余 top-k 计算"这一优化。所有 findings 都把它当成可能的问题/开销来评论（[0] 质疑 skip_topk 切换逻辑、[2][3] 说 named_modules 遍历），而非识别出该改动引入的性能问题；[1] 完全是另一处网络下载问题。没有一条抓住 ground truth 的机制，且方向多为质疑该优化而非指出其引入的退化。

Ground truth 描述的是一个新增的 opt-in 更快的专家通信后端（DeepEP v2 集成），并非现有回归；这属于新增能力而非可抓的性能"问题"。检测器的 findings 都在挑该新代码内部的局部微优化（per-expert kernel 循环、D2H 同步、额外拷贝、mask 分配），都是"另一个问题"层面的局部反模式，没有一条对应 ground truth 所述的整体新后端集成机制。判 MISS（另一个问题/机制不吻合）。

Ground truth 是把新增的 fused MoE W4A16 HIP kernel 当作一个更快的路径替换旧的 Triton fallback（性能改进，方向为提速）。而 findings 都是在挑这个新 kernel 内部的潜在低效点（atomic 竞争、LDS 重复加载、padding block），说的是新 kernel 里存在的问题，而非识别出"用新 HIP 路径替换慢 Triton 路径以提升吞吐"这一改动本身；方向与机制都不吻合。

Ground truth描述的是新增一个更快的FP8 GEMM后端（新路径引入），而非一个性能问题；三条findings都把该改动当成潜在性能退化来批评（per-call solution_index=-1重新选择、每次import开销、displace已有路径），方向与ground truth相反，且ground truth本质上不是缺陷而是新特性，无一条实质抓住"这是一个更快的可选后端"这一事实。

Finding [0] identifies the exact change: default connector switched from in-process LMCacheConnectorV1 (local_cpu offloading) to LMCacheMPConnector talking to a standalone server, in the same config path—mechanism and location both match. Finding [1] additionally captures the dropped kv_offloading_size propagation.

Ground truth 的核心是"新增了一个更融合的 FLASHINFER_MLA_SPARSE_DSV4 decode 后端及配套 fused kernel，作为可选路径以降低延迟"。所有 findings 都在挑该 kernel 内部的微观实现细节（未实现 reduced-grid 变体、nope lane 冗余解码、warp 分支发散等），把这个改动当成需要优化的对象，而非识别到"该 diff 引入的是一条新的性能路径"这一 ground truth 机制；方向与关注点均不吻合。
机制吻合：finding 指出返回值现在存 AttentionStatePair 同时保留 warmup 和 captured state，而父代码丢弃了 warmup state 只保留 capture state——这正是 ground truth 描述的核心改动与机制，位置也对应同一处 FULL cudagraph descriptor 逻辑。

Ground truth 是新增 torch.compile pattern-matcher 替换（AllReduceGemmaRMSNormPattern 等）将 all_reduce+RMSNorm 融合进 FlashInfer 单 kernel。两条 finding 都在讨论 GemmaRMSNorm.forward_native 用 float32 weight 导致无法命中快速 CUDA/AITER 融合 kernel——这是另一个方向/机制（说明改动阻碍了逐 kernel 的融合），并未识别出新增 AR+RMSNorm 融合 pattern 这一 ground-truth 机制与位置。

Ground truth 描述的是一个 opt-in 的 SWA 前缀缓存保留特性，净效果是提升前缀缓存命中率、减少 prefill 重算（吞吐提升，非回归）。所有 findings 都把这些改动当作新引入的性能开销（额外 Python 循环、reachable_block_mask 调用、双 free_blocks 调用），方向相反——它们视有益特性为回归，而未识别出 GT 所述的 SWA 前缀缓存保留机制及其吞吐收益。
Finding [1] 准确指出 p-pivot 搜索从三分（两探针 1/3、2/3）改为单探针 0.5 的二分搜索，且识别出两次扫描被融合为一次（"one fused scan"），机制与位置与 ground truth 完全吻合。

Finding [1] explicitly identifies the request_cached_ids reverse-index dict replacing the O(n) recompute in get_cached_input_ids with O(1) lookups as "the intended win," matching one of the two mechanisms in ground truth (position and encoder_cache_manager both fit). Finding [0] also describes the bisect-based window search, though it frames it as a correctness concern; [1] most directly captures the perf mechanism.

Ground truth 的核心是：新设计是一个性能优化——预注册权重+目标缓冲、add_recv 立即发起零拷贝 RDMA READ 以隐藏传输延迟、去掉 staging copies。而所有 findings 都把这个改动当成引入性能问题来批评（每 expert 一次传输而非批量、重复构建描述符、增加注册内存、轮询开销更大），方向与 ground truth 相反，且都不是"改动引入的问题"这一维度的命中。
Ground truth 的问题是"新增 XPU 原生 fp8 GEMM 内核并插入优先级列表前端"这一改进本身（latent-inefficiency 优化）。两条 finding 都在挑新内核实现内部的小瑕疵（B.t() 非连续、空 bias 张量分配），属于另一个/更细的问题，并未识别出"引入并置于 Triton fallback 之前从而改变 dispatch"这一核心机制。

Finding [0] identifies the NCCL_MAX_CTAS=8 override extension to the deep_gemm_mega_moe backend with EPLB enabled — matching the ground truth's mechanism about override_envs_for_eplb setting NCCL_MAX_CTAS=8 to prevent NCCL weight-exchange collectives contending with the MoE backend kernels; same location and mechanism.

Finding[1] identifies that the exception from batch_is_exist now propagates but the finally block ensures dec_stored_request/task_done always run — matching the ground-truth mechanism that the counter previously wasn't decremented on the raising path, pinning GPU blocks. Finding[0] only addresses the early-return task_done issue, a related but different concern.

Ground truth 描述的是本 commit 新增的 FlashInfer 快速路径替换掉昂贵的全词表排序 (apply_top_k_top_p) 从而降低延迟——这是一个性能改进。所有 finding 都在讨论新增路径的边缘开销或批处理禁用问题（另一个/次要问题），没有一条识别出"原生 sort+gumbel 路径的全词表排序是被优化掉的昂贵操作"这一核心机制；且方向上是挑新路径的毛病而非识别被解决的排序开销。属于"另一个问题/方向不符"。

Ground truth 是：移除 #ifndef USE_ROCM 守卫后在 ROCm 上启用了原生 HIP fp8 quant kernel（替代慢的 Triton fallback）从而提升吞吐，并启用 RMSNorm+block-fp8 融合。两条 finding 都把这些改动当作"可能引入开销/未调优"的隐患来讨论（wave32 vs wave64 调优、pattern-matcher 注册开销），方向相反——它们把启用性能优化的改动当成潜在退化，而非识别出这是提升吞吐的优化本身。

Finding [0] identifies the exact change—dynamic_padded_cutlass adds the %4 alignment check and takes run_direct (plain cutlass_scaled_mm) to bypass the padding path, matching the ground-truth mechanism and location.

Ground truth is that the four coordinated changes reduce pipeline bubbles (a beneficial change). The findings that touch the correct locations (index 1 on decode-throttle, index 4 on step_with_batch_queue early-return) all frame these as introducing new problems (throttling hurting low concurrency, returning control prematurely), i.e. they treat the bubble-avoidance changes as harmful rather than recognizing the intended bubble-reduction mechanism — direction is opposite/another problem, not a hit on the actual perf improvement.
Ground truth 是启用 PowerPC 的共享内存 CPU 集合通信后端（shm.cpp / cpu_communicator.py 的 SHM 选择分支）替代较慢的 Gloo。三条 findings 分别讲 FP16/FP32 向量转换的标量化开销和误提交的空文件，均与 SHM 集合通信路径无关，属于另一个问题。

Ground truth is that encoder CUDA graphs were previously OMITTED from the startup memory estimate (under-reporting → KV cache over-allocation → OOM risk); the commit ADDS them. Finding [0] describes the new encoder capture behavior but frames it as an over-capture/inefficiency concern rather than identifying the missing-from-estimate under-reporting problem the commit fixes. No finding identifies that encoder graph memory was previously excluded from total_estimate; they describe the fix's side effects, not the underlying problem. This is a direction/mechanism miss.
机制吻合：finding 指出移除 Eagle 专用 CUDA graph pool（EagleCudaGraphManagerBase / graph_pool_handle），改为共享全局 pool，与 ground truth 的内存复用机制及位置一致。
Finding 描述的是改动的效果（PP>1 时禁用 fusion 会走 un-fused 路径、增加开销），实际上是把该改动当成一个性能退化来看待，方向与 ground truth 相反——ground truth 的问题是原本的 fusion 在 PP>1 会因 spin-wait 死锁挂起，该改动是修复。finding 未识别出 deadlock/spin-wait 机制。

Ground truth 不是一个可判定的性能回归，而是"首次为 XPU 后端启用原生 Triton selective-scan 内核"这一 enablement 改动，本身不含被引入的性能问题。findings 讨论的是这个新内核内部的各种效率细节（串行扫描、strided gather、向量利用率、softplus），但没有一条对应 ground truth 所描述的"该问题"——因为 ground truth 明确说明这不是 regression。方向不匹配，判 MISS。

Finding [2] identifies the same SparseAttnCompressKernel restructuring: rows_per_warp 8→16, num_warps 16→8, shortened shuffle reductions—matching the ground-truth thread/warp remapping mechanism and location. Though it frames the change as a deliberate retuning (and even notes concern), it correctly pinpoints the specific diff change rather than a generic pattern.

Finding [0] correctly identifies that prompt_embeds decode (torch.load/to_dense/base64) was moved to run via the executor and discusses the async/concurrency wiring around this exact CPU-bound decode path — matching the ground-truth mechanism and location (safe_load_prompt_embeds offloaded through make_async/gather to keep the event loop responsive).
Finding[0] 精确指出 `int(indptr[-1].item())` 在 CUDA/cumsum 结果上触发 device→host 同步造成流水线停顿，与 ground truth 的机制与位置完全吻合。
Finding[0] 正确识别出改动将 EPLB use_async 默认从 False 翻为 True，并指出 async 路径将专家权重传输移出前向关键路径以降低延迟，机制与位置均与 ground truth 吻合（虽为方向正确的性能改进解读，但准确抓住了该改动本质）。

Finding [0] correctly identifies the enabling change (removing DISABLE_AITER_SAMPLER fallback to forward_native) at the same location, and points to the now-active aiter_sample path affecting per-step sampling latency—same mechanism and direction as the ground truth.

Finding [0] identifies the backend priority flip (AITER_MXFP4_BF16 preferred over TRITON_UNFUSED) as the throughput-relevant change and correctly frames it as a net perf win enabled by the shuffle/TP-offset fixes—matching the ground-truth mechanism and location. Findings [1] and [2] correctly describe the shuffle and TP-offset fixes, reinforcing the same story.

Finding [0] identifies the exact mechanism: the new offload_prompt_only flag defaults to True in base.py and changes default behavior so decode-phase KV blocks are no longer offloaded to CPU. Machinery, location, and direction all match the ground truth.

Ground truth describes an intended speedup (adding AMD-Zen quantized kernels at front of CPU priority lists), not a regression. The findings instead flag potential correctness/eligibility issues (missing fast-path checks, missing reshape) and a load-time cost—these are different concerns, not identifying the change as the described performance-improving kernel routing. No finding captures the ground-truth mechanism as a matched problem.

Finding [1] identifies the exact dispatch widening from `0 < n <= 4` to `<= 5` in rocm_unquantized_gemm_impl, routing n==5 (speculative decode) to the skinny wvSplitK kernel instead of the fallback — mechanism and location both match the ground truth.

Finding [0] identifies exactly the same change—CPU now routes top-k/top-p to the Triton kernel when HAS_TRITON—at the same location (apply_top_k_top_p), which is the core of the ground-truth change. Though it argues Triton may be slower without a batch guard (opposite of the intended benefit), it correctly pins down the mechanism and location of the routing change from the PyTorch sort path to the Triton path.

Finding [0] identifies the exact new mechanism (`_maybe_get_pct_cpu_binding` restricting workers to PCT priority cores via `cpu_id % stride in (0,1)`) on the same SKUs/file as the ground truth, matching the auto-detection PCT pinning change.

Ground truth 是关于本 commit 为 ARM 等非 x86 CPU 引入 blas_gemm 回退、把 fla.cpp 移入通用编译列表，从而用融合内核替换缓慢的纯 PyTorch 参考路径以提升吞吐；这是把改动当作性能改进。而各条 finding 都在挑新回退路径本身可能不够快（.DEFAULT 选默认实现、sbgemm 未必优化、scratch buffer 浪费），方向相反——把该改进当成潜在问题，且均为 suggestion 级或未针对 GT 机制，未识别出"之前 ARM 走慢速参考路径"这一被修复的问题。

Ground truth 是一个 latent-inefficiency 优化（新增 RDNA3 native W4A16 GPTQ 内核以提升吞吐），但所有 finding 都把该 diff 里的具体机制（packed CAS atomic-add、BLOCK_KN_SIZE 启发式、WMMA 阈值）当成潜在性能缺陷来批评，方向相反——它们没有识别出"这是替换慢的 Triton fallback 的优化"这一本质。

Finding [4] identifies the core change (enable_notification=False disabling MoRIIO inbound transfer status notifications, completion signaled via ZMQ) as the intended fix for the hang — matching the ground-truth mechanism and location (moriio_engine.py notification config). Mechanism and position both align.

Ground truth 是三处正向优化（gate out_dtype 改为 bf16 避免 cast、条件化 shrink-tail zeroing、CPU 指纹跳过 kernel launch）。所有 findings 都把这些优化当成潜在 bug/性能隐患来质疑（如指纹触发 D2H 同步、buffer 共享正确性、shrink-tail zeroing 对 cudagraph 的正确性），方向相反——不是识别"改动引入的性能问题"，而是怀疑优化本身。且 finding [0] 关注的是被引入优化可能带来的同步，与 GT 三处优化的机制方向均不吻合。
Ground truth 是"这个 commit 把三步融合成一个 kernel（性能改进）"，但检测任务应指出改动引入/存在的性能问题。findings 中 [0] 关注 decode 分支的正确性、[1] 说 autotune 一次性延迟、[2] 明确说不是回归——没有一条指出这次融合改动本身引入的性能问题，方向与机制都对不上。

Finding [0] correctly identifies the core change—removal of @support_torch_compile from DeepseekV4Model/DeepSeekV4MTP in both nvidia/ and amd/, and the replacement with the two hand-fused RMSNorm Triton kernels—matching the ground-truth mechanism and location. It engages the specific diff rather than generic reasoning.
方向相反：ground truth 是该改动（每批一次加锁、HashMap、mimalloc）为性能改进，而 finding 却把新增的 Vec 分配当成这次改动引入的性能开销来批评，未识别出核心机制（减少 per-output 锁获取/查找成本），属于把有益改动当问题看。

Finding [0] correctly identifies that the code now unconditionally allocates via torch.empty_like instead of reusing the input hidden_states buffer (inplace path removed), matching the ground-truth mechanism and location; finding [1] captures the same for the modular path.

Ground truth 的性能点是新增 dispatch policy env var 通过 fused_moe 影响排序调度模式（single-pass vs multi-pass）从而改变吞吐；而 finding[0] 指的是 @if_aiter_supported 装饰器在热路径上每次调用未缓存的开销，finding[1] 指 None 值透传问题——两者都是围绕同一改动但描述的是另外的问题（装饰器开销/None 传递），未识别出 policy 选择对吞吐的核心机制。属于"另一个问题"。

Finding [0] only discusses the one-time memory cost of the new buffer, and finding [1] explicitly frames the change as a net performance improvement (praising it), rather than identifying the redundant repeated .to(bf16) cast in the hot path as the problem this commit fixes. Neither identifies the latency mechanism as an introduced/existing problem — direction/framing is wrong.

Ground truth 的性能问题是"新增专用 fp32_router_gemm CUDA kernel 及 GateLinear 的 Tier 2 分派"这一改动本身（意在降低小 batch 路由 GEMM 延迟）。两条 finding 都在 kernel 内部挑微观优化点（VPT/带宽、K 循环缺 #pragma unroll），属于对该改动的细枝末节评论，且都是低严重度 suggestion，并未识别出 ground truth 所指的核心改动性质，属"另一个问题/泛泛"类。

Ground truth 是新增 CuteDSL/tcgen05 SM100 GDN prefill 内核以提升 Blackwell prefill 吞吐（含避免 GPU->CPU 同步的 on-GPU metadata）；而该 finding 指的是 _resolve_gdn_prefill_backend 在 init 时调用 _is_libs_cu13_install_intact 做文件哈希校验，属于另一个（安装完整性检查开销）问题，与 GT 机制不吻合。

Finding [1] identifies that padding moved from the separate F.pad into the fused kernel (allocating q_out inside the op instead of in-place q), which is exactly the ground-truth mechanism/location; findings [0] and [2] correctly describe the zero-fill pad slots of the same fused kernel change too, so the diff-specific mechanism is captured.

Finding[0] correctly identifies the T.Pipelined(num_stages=2)→T.Serial change on the h-block loop at the same location as the ground truth. Though the detector frames it as a potential regression rather than an optimization, it accurately pinpoints the specific mechanism and code change (one of the three micro-optimizations in this kernel diff).

Ground truth 描述的是新增 CuTe DSL 融合内核作为一个性能优化改动（no prior regression），而 findings 指向的是该内核实现中的其他潜在问题：dispatch 包装开销 [0]、首次编译延迟 [1]、每 token 一个 threadblock 导致大量空跑 [2]。这些是针对该 diff 的具体子问题，但都不是 ground truth 所标注的"引入融合内核加速 compressor pipeline"这一核心改动本身，属于另一个问题层面。
Finding[1] 准确指出 sleep 条件从 has_unfinished_requests() 扩展为 has_requests()，并识别出"仅剩等待延迟 KV-connector free 的已完成请求"这一场景——正是 ground truth 的机制与位置（core.py 的 GIL-yield guard），方向也正确（此改动修复紧凑轮询问题）。
Finding [0] 准确识别出本 commit 将 MiniMax QK-norm 融合从编译期 PatternMatcher pass 迁移到 forward_qkv 的运行时"manual fusion"，并指向了同一处 Lamport 融合 all-reduce+RMS kernel (minimax_allreduce_rms_qk)，机制与位置均与 ground truth 吻合。
Finding[1] 明确指出移除的是 rebalance 关键路径上的全设备同步，会阻塞 CPU 直到 GPU 队列排空、每次 EPLB rearrange 都造成 stall——机制与位置均与 ground truth 吻合，且方向正确（认定其为合理的延迟改进）。

Ground truth 是把 MHC 的 pre/post/head 融合为 TileLang 内核以优化 ROCm 上的慢路径（一个 latent-inefficiency 优化），并非引入某个具体的性能退化。所有 findings 都是围绕新代码猜测潜在的低效点（n_splits、functools.cache、warp 宽度、JIT 编译开销），没有一条指出 GT 所述的"这个改动本身就是把分离的 torch/triton op 融合以降低 latency"这一机制；且多为泛泛的 suggestion 级担忧，方向与 GT 不吻合。

Finding [2] identifies the new `mhc_pre_big_fuse_with_norm_tilelang` kernel's two-pass RMSNorm structure (Pass 1 stashes hidden vector while accumulating sumsq, Pass 2 rescales and writes to HBM) versus the original single-pass kernel — matching the ground-truth mechanism and location exactly. Finding [1] also captures the NormGateLinear→GateLinear split, but [2] most directly matches the kernel-level mechanism.

Ground truth 的核心是这次改动"启用了 FlashInfer/cuDNN attention 后端、通过每序列长度元数据打通编码器路径，使更快的图可复用注意力路径可用"，属于对改动本身机制的识别。而三条 findings 都把改动当作引入了新的 D2H 同步/numpy 往返/额外拷贝的性能退化，方向与 ground truth 相反（把有益改动当成问题），且未识别出"启用 FlashInfer 后端"这一实际机制。
所有 findings 都指向连接器的线程池/文件锁问题，与 ground truth 的 prepare_next_token_ids_padded 中每步 torch.tensor 分配与隐式 H2D 传输/.tolist() 同步无关，属于另一个问题。

Ground truth is about skipping non-local expert LoRA weights at read time to avoid loading them into CPU memory (a memory-saving improvement). Findings [0] and [1] treat the newly added helpers as minor CPU overhead (dismissed as negligible), not the memory mechanism; [2] correctly describes the local-expert pruning but frames it as intentional/beneficial ("frees non-local expert tensors") rather than identifying a performance problem introduced by the diff. None points to a performance problem matching the ground truth direction.

Ground truth 是：该 commit 为 batch-invariant 模式新增了 CUTLASS GEMM 路径以替代慢速 emulation，是一项性能改进。Finding[0] 只是描述了 TileScheduler 从 void 改为 PersistentScheduler 这一实现细节，并未指出这是引入的性能问题；Finding[1] 指的是小-M 工作负载在大-M tiling 下性能不佳的另一个问题，与 ground truth 描述的机制（用 CUTLASS 路径替代 emulation 从而提升吞吐）不一致，属于另一个问题。没有一条抓住 ground truth 的机制。

Ground truth is about replacing eager pure-PyTorch emulations with fused native XPU custom ops to reduce latency. Finding [0] discusses the shared top_k op but frames it as a correctness/dispatch issue (kernels only registered for CUDA, not XPU), not the latency-reducing fusion mechanism; finding [1] is a small unrelated contiguous copy. Neither captures the eager-to-fused-kernel replacement mechanism.

Ground truth is that the PRIOR commit's _encoder_max_batch under-modeled the one_hot int64 transient (using hidden_size*2*num_hidden_layers off 5% of total mem), causing OOM; the fix corrects the cost model and re-reads free memory. All findings instead critique the NEW _encoder_chunk approach (finding [0] even argues free-memory sizing is worse, i.e. direction-reversed dismissal of the fix), and none identify the missing one_hot transient / wrong per-patch cost as the introduced problem.
方向相反：finding[0] 把本次意在减少 per-element 乘法的 `g = g * RCP_LN2` 预缩放当成新增开销来批评，而 ground truth 正是通过这一预缩放+exp2 优化来提升吞吐，未识别出优化机制本身。finding[1] 只谈 fast-ops 路径未用近似 exp2，属另一个问题。

Ground truth is that the new reduced-grid variant is a throughput optimization for the low-token regime (fixing SM under-utilization). All three findings instead critique the new code as introducing problems (lost __ldg, higher register pressure, idle warps) — i.e., they treat the optimization as a regression rather than identifying the under-utilization mechanism the change addresses. Direction is essentially reversed / different concerns.

Finding [0] correctly identifies the VLEN-agnostic RVV attention microkernel rewrite (LMUL_256 macros at VLEN=256), pointing at the same code and mechanism as the ground truth—enabling/vectorizing the RVV path on VLEN=256 CPUs. Machine and location match, direction is correct.

Finding [0] identifies exactly the ground-truth mechanism: the removed blocking `.cpu().numpy()` sync in postprocess on the align path being replaced by a fused GPU kernel—same location and same mechanism.
机制吻合：finding 正确指出该 override 使 XPU 的 use_custom_op_call=True，导致 all_reduce/all_gather/reduce_scatter 走 torch.ops.vllm.* 自定义算子路径，位置同为 xpu.py/parallel_state.py，指向的正是本改动引入的影响。

Ground truth is that the commit fixes throughput by batching the per-item vision-tower forward calls. Finding [1] does point at the per-item Python loop but frames it as a residual problem in the pooling stage and criticizes the new code, rather than identifying the original per-image/per-frame encoder loop as the batched improvement; the other findings raise unrelated memory-budget/copy concerns. None captures the ground-truth mechanism in the correct direction.

Ground truth is about the ASYNC EPLB branch changing default from torch_gloo (CPU staging) to preferring nixl (avoiding CPU round-trip), i.e. the change is a performance improvement avoiding host staging. Finding [0] addresses the SYNC branch changing from torch_nccl to torch_gloo (wrong branch/direction). Findings [1] and [2] speculate that using nixl could regress vs NCCL or note negligible find_spec cost—neither identifies the async torch_gloo→nixl mechanism as the relevant change. All miss the specific problem/branch.
Ground truth 是这个 commit 引入了一个 opt-in 的 FlashInfer b12x 融合 FP4 MoE/GEMM 后端（新增内核路径），而两条 findings 只是挑出新代码里的次要反模式（每次 forward 的 int32 cast、加载时的 weight-scale 副本内存），并未指出该 backend 本身的机制或性能特性，属于另一个问题/泛泛评论。

Finding[0] identifies the revert of the `_patch_should_realize_on_reuse` monkeypatch gated to torch 2.11.0 and correctly cites the docstring mechanism (Inductor inlines a chain of computations without the patch), matching the ground-truth mechanism and location exactly.

Finding [1] identifies the exact mechanism: XPU flash-attn changed from UNIFORM_BATCH to AttentionCGSupport.ALWAYS in flash_attn.py, enabling full cudagraph capture on XPU—matching the ground-truth latency mechanism and location.
Finding[1] 准确识别出本次改动的核心：FP8 默认路径在 has_cutedsl() 为 true 时被切换到新的 CuteDSL 内核，替换原有的 Triton _fused_indexer_q_rope_quant_kernel，位置与机制均与 ground truth 吻合。
唯一的 finding 只讨论 KMP_BLOCKTIME 1->5 这个 companion 的 OpenMP 调参，而 ground truth 的核心问题是 kv_len_per_thread 公式中错误乘以 head-count 导致 CPU 线程负载不均；finding 完全没有触及这个机制或位置，属于另一个问题。
Finding [1] 抓住了核心机制：持久化缓存的命中依赖 hash 因子稳定，若不稳定则每次启动都会 cache miss 并重跑完整的 FlashInfer autotune 基准 sweep——这正是 ground truth 关注的"每次进程启动重复执行昂贵的 autotune 导致 startup 时间"问题，且位置指向同一处新增的持久缓存逻辑。

Ground truth 的问题是持久化文件缓存的哈希冲突导致选错 FlashInfer kernel tactic，本 commit 通过禁用持久缓存来恢复正确选择。Finding[0] 反而指出新路径 `autotune()` 无参数、tune_mode 默认 False 从而"不再真正调优"——这是把该改动当成引入了新问题（方向相反，且机制是"未调优"而非"缓存冲突"）；finding[1] 也只是说 warmup 无收益。二者都未识别出持久缓存哈希冲突这一真实机制。
Ground truth 是这个改动本身作为性能改进（FP8xFP8 GEMM 提升 throughput）；三条 finding 都在讨论新增路径的细枝末节开销并一致判定"无明显回归/一次性成本"，没有一条识别出这是引入 FP8 Q-scale 快路径以加速矩阵乘的核心机制，方向与粒度均不吻合。

GT 的核心是这个 PR 消除 GPU↔CPU 同步（把阻塞式 h2d/`.item()`/`.tolist()` 换成 async/non_blocking/CPU 构建）从而降低延迟——即该改动是性能改进。但所有 findings 都反向解读：把 CPU 构建+pin_memory、non_blocking、.contiguous() 等描述成新引入的开销/问题，方向相反，且均为 suggestion 级泛泛质疑，未识别出"消除同步点降低延迟"这一实质机制。

两条 finding 都识别到了这处 patch 的位置（should_realize_on_reuse 的 size-aware 成本模型，torch 2.11.0 版本门控），但方向都相反：ground truth 是"没有该 patch 会导致 inline 重算级联、拖累吞吐"，而 finding[0] 反过来担心 patch 会"过度 materialize、增加内存/写流量"，finding[1] 则说 patch 只增加编译开销、不影响运行时——都没有抓住"不打 patch 会重算 residual 并级联膨胀冗余计算"这一真实问题。

Finding[0] identifies the exact new block_size_m tuning loop in batched_fused_marlin_moe and its dependence on BATCH_TOKENS_MAX vs per-expert valid tokens, directly addressing the padding-overhead mechanism in the same code location as the ground truth.

Finding[0] (and [1]) precisely identify the commented-out aiter fused kernels (mhc_pre_aiter/mhc_post_aiter) being replaced by the slower mhc_pre_torch/mhc_post_torch path for the hidden_size%256==0 case, matching the ground-truth mechanism and location.
Finding [2] 明确指出 enable_flashinfer_autotune 在 O1/O2 从 False 翻转为 True，与 ground truth 的核心改动一致；它虽将此描述为增加启动延迟，但正确识别了改动位置和机制（此前被禁用、现在开启 autotune），指向的是本 diff 的这处配置翻转。

Ground truth 的问题是：改动通过声明 UNIFORM_BATCH 使 TRITON_MLA decode 变得可被 full cudagraph 捕获，从而消除此前每步的 kernel-launch 开销/GPU bubble——即改动是一个性能改进。两条 findings 都把方向搞反了：它们担心开启 cudagraph 捕获会带来副作用（固化 num_kv_splits、缺少持久缓冲区），指出的是改动可能引入的正确性/兼容风险，而非 ground truth 所指的"此前 NEVER 默认导致的 launch 开销被消除"这一机制。方向相反且机制不吻合。
Finding[0] 指向同一处改动（bmm 直接写入 out.transpose(0,1)），并识别出这消除了此前的显式拷贝，机制与位置均吻合 ground truth。

Finding [0] identifies the exact mechanism and location: replacing the generic torch.topk fallback (_topk_indices_torch) with the fused C++ kernels top_k_per_row_prefill/decode for topk_tokens==2048, matching the ground truth precisely.

Finding [0] identifies the .item() D2H sync in the FP8 prefill PS metadata build, specifically the num_partial_tiles read — the exact mechanism the ground-truth path was designed to avoid (resolving it at metadata-build time to prevent an in-forward sync/CUDA Graph break). Mechanism and location match the new FP8 PS prefill path.

Ground truth 的性能问题实为"新增 AMX 快速路径带来吞吐提升（latent-inefficiency removal / 新硬件加速）"。三条 findings 都是在 AMX 路径内部挑毛病（每次探测硬件、多余 contiguous、gather+scatter），指的是与 ground truth 无关的次要开销，且方向上把新增的优化路径当成问题，没有识别出"这是一条加速改动"这一核心。属于"另一个问题/方向"类 MISS。
Ground truth 是"新启用了更快的 XPU FP8 block-scaled 原生内核路径"（吞吐提升的功能性改动，非回退）。两条 finding 方向都相反：[0] 担心 XPU 分支参数不足会出错，[1] 把 E8M0 upcast contiguous 拷贝当成引入的开销，都是在指改动可能带来的负面/正确性问题，而非识别出这是启用更快路径的性能改进。

Finding[0] identifies the exact change: TOKENSPEED_MLA inserted at priority 2 behind FLASHINFER_MLA in cuda.py's Blackwell MLA priority list, and even notes the bs-dependent latency tradeoff ("wins past bs≈8, regresses at bs≤2"). Mechanism, position, and direction all align with the ground truth.

Finding[1] 直接指出 flex_attn_block_m/block_n 是 Triton kernel BLOCK_M/BLOCK_N tile 大小，小 tile 降低算术强度和 GPU 占用从而降低吞吐，且提及 VLLM_BATCH_INVARIANT 默认 16 的路径——机制与位置均与 ground truth 吻合。此外 finding[0] 也命中了 direct_build 在 kv_block_size != cache block_size 时被关闭的次要机制。
Ground truth 描述的是新增 packed 分块传输路径优化了已存在的内存限制（不是回归）。Finding [1] 提到了 packed 路径，但方向相反——它把 packed 说成引入了额外 GPU 内存拷贝的问题，而 GT 明确指出这是有界内存的优化而非退化，且未识别出"分块后可回收内存、避免全模型同时驻留"这一核心机制。其余 findings 均为无关的另外问题。

Ground truth 的核心是该改动通过持久缓冲区 + 移除嵌套 torch.compile 使 decode 路径可被 CUDA graph 捕获，从而消除 kernel-launch bubble——是一个性能改进。而各 finding 都把这些改动当作引入的性能问题来批评（finding 0 说移除 torch.compile 有害，finding 1/2 说缓冲区分配和 copy 增加开销），方向相反，没有识别出这是为了实现 CUDA graph 捕获、净收益为减少 launch 气泡。
Ground truth 是"新增 RVV 向量化 attention kernel 加速了一贯偏慢的标量回退路径"（一个改进/延迟低效被优化的说法）。三条 finding 都是在这个新 RVV 代码内部挑毛病（fallback 转换循环、strided store、冗余整数除法），指出的是另外的次要问题，并未识别 ground truth 所描述的核心改动本质，方向与机制都不吻合。

Ground truth 关注的是新增融合 kernel 相对旧路径（rms_norm + dsv3_router_gemm 两次 launch）消除了一次 kernel launch 与 normed_x 的 global memory 往返，是一个性能改进；而 findings 都在指出该融合 kernel 内部的其他潜在问题（PDL 硬编码、384 block 冗余重算 RMS、寄存器压力），没有一条识别出 GT 所述的"融合以减少 launch/内存往返"这一机制与收益，属于另一个问题。

Ground truth 的核心是默认执行路径静默切换到 Model Runner V2（tri-state 默认 + 路由 Qwen3 到新执行/注意力/调度路径），改变运行时性能路径。两条 finding 都在讲另一个问题——property 未 memoize 且每次调用 entry_points() 扫描已安装分发包的开销，属于 diff 中相关但不同的机制，未识别出默认路径切换这一 ground truth 问题。

Ground truth 描述的是这个改动作为新能力，旨在减少 FX piecewise 在 attention 边界产生的 graph break、提升 CUDA-graph 覆盖率。而三条 findings 都在把该新机制当作性能问题来批评（replay 时逐段 Python 调用开销、warmup 时反复 gc、eager 路径每次调用的检查开销），方向相反且指向的是不同的次要开销，均未抓住"该实验机制相对 FX piecewise 是在减少 graph break/bubble"这一 ground truth 机制。

Ground truth is about the memory-saving optimization: deduplicating identical draft/target embed_tokens/lm_head weights via _should_share to cut GPU memory. The findings all treat the new torch.equal comparison as a cost/overhead problem (CPU copies, unit mismatch, per-load comparison) — they see the change as introducing a problem rather than identifying the latent memory-duplication issue it fixes. Wrong direction/different problem.
Finding is empty; no mechanism or location identified regarding the shm_broadcast busy-poll / MWAITX spinloop change.
两条 finding 都把改动描述为方向正确的位置（__init__ 缓存 workspace），但都当成中性/正向优化来评论（缓存视图、减少热路径查找），没有指出真正的机制：热路径中 lazy 分配会在 WorkspaceManager 被 lock 后触发 AssertionError / 意外显存分配。属于方向相反（夸改动）且未命中 memory 机制。

Finding [0] identifies the exact mechanism: ncclCommAbort/destroy blocks until CUDA graphs capturing NCCL ops are released, but those graphs are dropped later in the same main-thread teardown, causing the self-deadlock — matching the ground truth in both mechanism and location.

Both findings discuss the new persistent `_in_flight_store_gpu_blocks` set but treat it as introducing potential correctness/leak bugs (stuck entries, block-ID recycling causing incorrect skips). The ground truth is that this change *fixes* a throughput problem (redundant GPU→CPU offload copies on shared prefixes); neither finding identifies the pre-existing per-step-reset redundant-copy issue nor frames the change's mechanism—direction is essentially inverted and the actual perf mechanism is missed.

Finding [2] identifies sampler.py building token_ids/valid_mask on CPU then uploading non-blocking to remove D2H syncs — matching ground-truth mechanism (a). Findings [0] and [1] also correctly recognize the dp_utils non-blocking upload and penalties.py index_fill_ sync-avoidance mechanisms, but [2] cleanly matches mechanism and location.

Finding [0] identifies the same change (_warmup_ssd_kernels in the profile run, both HAS_INITSTATES paths) and the same mechanism—triggering Triton autotuning at startup. It even notes the two-path loop, matching the ground truth about lazy JIT autotuning. Direction and position are correct.
机制吻合：finding 明确指出 build() 中 seq_lens.cpu() 的无条件阻塞 device→host 拷贝，在纯 decode 路径每步都发生，位置与 ground truth 完全一致。
Finding [1] 准确抓住机制：revert 恢复了 fcntl 文件锁 + SharedMemory 的同步 D2H 传输路径，在 routing capture 激活时给关键路径增加同步/拷贝开销，与 ground truth 的"移除 async D2H 优化、恢复同步阻塞路径"完全吻合，位置与方向均正确。

Finding[0] identifies the exact mechanism in the same code: the new CUTLASS FP8 batch-invariant dispatch pins a fixed M-independent tile config (M64 etc.) regardless of actual M, matching the ground-truth "keep the CUTLASS config independent of M for batch invariance" latency tradeoff.

Ground truth 是"新增 TD 加载/存储路径提供更快的 tensor-descriptor 路径（性能改进，无既有回归）"。finding[0] 讲的是 tile size clamp（另一个问题），finding[1] 只涉及次要的 kernel 参数移动（微优化，且方向是描述其机制而非本质 TD 路径），finding[2] 讲 host-side gating 检查（另一个问题）。没有一条抓住 TD 快速路径这一核心机制。
两条 finding 都指向同一处改动（返回 HND），但方向相反：ground truth 认为 HND 是提升 offload 传输吞吐的优化（有益改动），而 finding[0]/[1] 把它当作会拖累 compute 路径、引入 layout 转换的性能问题来批评。属于"方向相反/把有益改动当问题"，判 MISS。

Ground truth 是：这个 commit 用 supports_hma 能力检查替换了无条件禁用 HMA，从而恢复 hybrid/sliding-window/Mamba 模型的 KV-cache 内存效率（是内存问题）。Finding [3] 确实指向了 HMA gating 与 supports_hma 检查这处代码，但它把改动描述为"额外实例化 connector 类做 supports_hma 测试，增加了开销"，方向相反——把这个恢复内存效率的改动当成引入开销的性能负担，未识别出真正的内存节省机制。其余 findings 全部指向无关的 cache 读写代码。
Finding [2] 抓住了核心机制：persistent work-stealing 元数据总是被附加并无条件转发给 mla_decode_fwd，使 sparse 内核总走 work-stealing persistent 路径，并指出这在小 decode batch 下可能并非更快（与 ground truth 的启用持久化路径这一改动同位置、同机制、方向正确）。

Findings all describe secondary details of the new fused kernel/pass (grid sizing, pattern count, dispatch specializations) rather than identifying the diff's intent/effect as a latency-reducing fusion. None captures the ground-truth mechanism (collapsing RoPE+KV-cache concat+q_concat into one kernel to cut launches/round-trips); they treat the change's incidentals, not the core problem, and if anything frame it as overhead in the wrong direction.

Ground truth is that the new CuteDSL kernel replaces an untuned Triton path to reduce latency (the change is a performance improvement/optimization of a latent inefficiency). The findings instead flag secondary issues around the CuteDSL wrapper (decorator ordering, eager double-compile, JIT compile stall, per-call branch overhead)—none identify the untuned num_warps=1 Triton path or characterize the CuteDSL kernel as the intended latency fix. Wrong direction / different problems.
Ground truth 是这个改动本身用于修复 P 节点 KV 块泄漏的机制；而三条 findings 都是把该修复代码当作潜在性能负担来评论（额外 wrapper 开销、streaming 场景漏判、rejection 路径分配后即销毁），没有一条指出"若不通知 P 节点释放则 KV 块被泄漏"这一被修复的问题。方向相反/另一个问题，均为 suggestion 级泛泛评论。

Finding [3] correctly identifies that this change forces unaligned shapes through padded CUTLASS instead of the prior Triton fallback—matching the ground-truth mechanism (padding to 16-alignment to enable the faster CUTLASS kernel for non-aligned FP8 GEMM shapes). Findings [0]-[2] critique the per-forward padding cost but frame it as a regression rather than recognizing the CUTLASS-vs-Triton tradeoff; [3] pins the actual mechanism and location.

Ground truth is that this diff INTRODUCES the FSE fast path (fewer kernel launches/GEMMs) as a performance improvement. The findings instead flag alleged problems with the fusion code (unfreed tensors, lazy cat during graph capture, per-forward overhead) — they treat the improvement as introducing issues rather than identifying the intended latency-reduction mechanism. None captures the ground-truth mechanism/direction; several are direction-inverted or point to different concerns.

两条 finding 都聚焦于新函数的边界/正确性风险（CUDA 张量触发 RuntimeError 走回退、orjson 对 fp16/bf16 dtype 的兼容性），都把 numpy 路径当成潜在问题来质疑，而没有识别出 ground truth 的核心机制——即用 zero-copy ndarray 替代 tolist() 以避免 Python list 物化和逐元素迭代所带来的序列化延迟改进。方向与机制均不吻合。

Ground truth 的性能问题是：旧的固定超时（480s）导致 prefiller 长时间 pin 住孤儿 KV 块、造成内存压力，此 commit 用 lease/heartbeat 机制将持有时间缩短到 30s 以缓解内存。而所有 findings 都在质疑新引入的 heartbeat 机制自身的开销（引用传递、fan-out、锁、hot path），方向相反且属于另一个问题——没有一条识别出"缩短 KV 块持有时间以降低内存压力"这一核心改动。

Finding[0] identifies the exact mechanism: lookup() now returns None (not False) for in-flight blocks, propagating to defer the scheduler lookup for retry — matching the ground-truth mechanism and location.

Ground truth is that this diff *introduces* a fused XPU kernel to avoid the slow per-step full-vocab sort (an optimization). Ground truth 的核心是新增 ROCm/AITER 融合快速路径带来的三项优化（forward_hip 融合内核、core_attn_out 缓冲区复用、torch.compile 融合三次 rearrange 拷贝）。而 findings 全部把这些改动当成潜在的性能"问题/退化"来评论（import 触发 JIT、多余的 zero_()、额外 flatten+copy、torch.compile 重编译、dtype 转换），方向与 ground truth 相反——GT 认为这些是性能改进而非退化。没有一条识别出"这是引入的快速路径优化"这一实质。
Finding[1] 指向 moe_runner 前向路径上新增的 per-layer `.copy_()`（含 `.to(torch.int16)`）到设备缓冲区这一改动，正是 ground truth 描述的 forward 路径写入机制与位置，识别出该改动引入的吞吐开销，机制与位置均吻合。

Ground truth 的核心机制是为 pick_silu_mul_fp8_config 增加 _pick_cache 短路线性扫描，以及 CaseKey 记忆化 hash/str 避免重复 JSON 序列化——这些是改进。而 finding[0] 恰恰把这个改动方向搞反了，指责 config_exists 从 O(1) 变 O(n) 是"回退"，且指向的是与 GT 优化路径不同的另一处代码；finding[1] 也是把新的排序/序列化当作"新增开销"来批评，方向与 GT（该改动是性能优化）相反，未识别出核心的缓存短路机制。

Ground truth 的问题是被本 commit 移除的旧缓解措施（time.sleep(0.5) 重试循环 + per-processor deepcopy）导致的吞吐退化，此 commit 是修复。三条 finding 都在质疑新引入的 thread pool/borrow-from-pool 机制的开销（deepcopy 成本、borrow 包装开销、eager 复制数量），指向的是修复方案的新代码，而非 ground truth 所述的 sleep-retry/deepcopy 序列化问题——属于"另一个问题"且方向偏离。

Ground truth is that the newly added Triton kernels are a latency improvement replacing the slow PyTorch emulation path. All three findings instead critique the new Triton implementation (tile-sizing heuristic, JIT recompilation, per-forward allocation) as introducing performance problems—i.e., they treat the beneficial change as harmful (direction reversed) and none identify the mechanism/benefit of replacing the element-wise torch ops path.

Finding [0] exactly identifies the mechanism: MLA broadcast notif keyed by local decode req_id instead of meta.remote.request_id, causing prefill ranks to reject it since they track _reqs_to_send by prefill-side id. Matches ground truth mechanism and location.

Ground truth is a deadlock caused by a race between START_DP_WAVE re-waking an engine into EP all-to-all while another is in dist.barrier — a collective-op mismatch fixed by two-phase pause. The findings analyze the new two-phase code as if it introduces performance overhead (dummy batches, consensus latency, extra all-reduces), treating the fix as the problem rather than identifying the deadlock/collective mismatch the change prevents. No finding identifies the FIRST_REQ/START_DP_WAVE race or collective-op mismatch mechanism.
